direction: Refining the typography of the lecture content pane to align with a modern, premium minimalist aesthetic, moving away from overly stylized serif and monospace headings.
problems: H1 uses Playfair Display which clashes with the Vercel/Linear minimalist style.
H2 has a heavy left border that feels outdated.
H3 uses uppercase monospace which is hard to read for longer subheadings.
H4 uses italic styling which can look inconsistent.

css_changes.why: Modernize H1 typography to match the premium minimalist style using Space Grotesk.
Simplify H2 by removing the heavy left border and updating font sizing for a cleaner look.
Update H3 to be more readable and less stylized by removing uppercase and monospace properties.
